detail: GWAS Catalog association with p=1e-97. Effect: OR/Beta=0.1861 [0.17-0.2] unit decrease novel. Initial sample: 70,657 Japanese ancestry individuals.
whyItMatters: This common-variant association is matched locally against the uploaded genotype and should be treated as a tendency signal, not a prediction.
riskSummary: CETP risk allele is associated with High density lipoprotein cholesterol levels (OR/Beta 0.1861 [0.17-0.2] unit decrease novel) in a large, replicated genome-wide study
notes: Generated from bulk GWAS Catalog data; effect size and ancestry transferability require review.

notes: Generated from bulk GWAS Catalog data; effect size and ancestry transferability require review.
